theme: Daily Patterns Vol. 1 — five starter stats on NQ daily candles
method: Pine indicator running on NQ1! daily chart with full available history (~27 years).
data_source_caveats: NQ1! continuous front-month — quarterly contract rolls (~4/year) introduce small artificial gaps that may inflate the 'gap < 25 pts' bucket counts. Pre-2001 era is electronic-trading-only with thinner liquidity. Daily session anchoring per TradingView default for the futures continuous contract.

stat_1_streak_continuation.description: P(next-day color | last N consecutive same-color days). Streaks counted exactly — after-3-green means streak length is exactly 3 (4th day prior was not green).

stat_2_close_quartile_followthrough.description: Conditioning on yesterday's close position within yesterday's range; measure next-day outcomes.

stat_3_nr7_expansion.description: NR7 = today's range is the smallest of the last 7 days. Measure next-day expansion and direction.

stat_4_gap_fill.description: Gap = today's open - yesterday's close. Filled = today's price returns to yesterday's close (low <= prevClose for gap-up; high >= prevClose for gap-down).

by_size.note: Likely inflated by quarterly contract roll micro-gaps

stat_5_range_position.description: Yesterday's close as % of last-20-day range. Measure next-day reversal rates.
